# Background Video

Add your hero background video here:

- **hero-bg.mp4** - MP4 format (recommended for broad compatibility)
- **hero-bg.webm** - WebM format (optional, for better compression)

Recommended specs:
- Resolution: 1920×1080 or 1280×720
- Duration: 10–30 seconds (loops automatically)
- File size: Keep under 5MB for fast loading

If no video files are present, the hero will fall back to the static image (hero-construction.svg).
